parts.text: A pair of white turf soccer shoes with gold and blue accents are displayed on a reflective surface, with one shoe turned to show its studded sole.

raw_json.text_preview: A pair of white turf soccer shoes with gold and blue accents are displayed on a reflective surface, with one shoe turned to show its studded sole.

key_observations.image_input_format: generate_content([text, {mime_type, data: bytes}]) or PIL Image
key_observations.url_support: Not direct; pass bytes or PIL (we fetched URL to bytes)
key_observations.content_block_type: Inline in contents; no separate type name like input_image

differences: Gemini: image as second element in contents; OpenAI: content block in message
mapping_to_current_system.conversion_needed: Convert image URL to bytes or upload; pass as part of contents.
